scene_summary: A restrained paper-texture scene with a large translucent flower/petal veil dominating the center, small Japanese text labels, a rail-like sunset slit at the lower left, and a fine copper sequencer line curling along the right side.

detected_objects.label: Flower Music veil
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Dominant translucent pressed-flower form with visible petal veins and overlapping vellum-like sheets across the center.

detected_objects.label: Sequencer ribbon
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Thin copper S-shaped musical/sequencer line with many vertical tick marks running down the right side.

detected_objects.label: Nearstalgia slit
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Low horizontal glowing sunset opening with railway tracks leading toward a bright horizon at the bottom left.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate uses a small number of large quiet forms with sparse anchors; high coverage comes from the dominant translucent flower field rather than object clutter.
